memoryArtifacts.headline: LES BLASONS DES SEIGNEURS DU FIEF D'ARTONNE
memoryArtifacts.description:
La famille de La Tour : "D'azur semé de fleurs de lys d'or à la tour d'argent maçonnée de sable". Ce privilège fut accordé, par concession du roi Philippe-Auguste, à Bertrand de La Tour IIe du nom.

L …

memoryArtifacts.headline: Note individuelle
memoryArtifacts.description:
Bernard de La Tour (vers 1190 † 29 décembre 1253 - en Terre Sainte), seigneur de La Tour (croisé avec Louis VIII de France en 1218, fait chevalier par Raimond VII comte de Toulouse en 1244).
Source : …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Bernard III de LA TOUR-d'AUVERGNE於大約1190年出生在法國崔英德-吉洛易圖爾斯時，他的父親Bertrand II de LA TOUR-d'AUVERGNE57歲，母親Judith de La Tour de Mercoeur26歲。他和Jeanne DE TOULOUSE-ROCHEFORT至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1253年12月29日享年64歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: LA
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Bernard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from ber(n) ‘bear’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. This was the name of three famous medieval churchmen: St Bernard of Menthon ( 923–1008 ), founder of a hospice on each of the Alpine passes named after him; the monastic reformer St Bernard of Clairvaux ( 1090–1153 ); and the scholastic philosopher Bernard of Chartres. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. A native Old English form, Beornheard, was superseded by the Norman form.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Bernard III de LA TOUR-d'AUVERGNE was born about 1190, in Tours, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, France, his father, Bertrand II de LA TOUR-d'AUVERGNE, was 57 and his mother, Judith de La Tour de Mercoeur, was 26. He had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Jeanne DE TOULOUSE-ROCHEFORT. He died on 29 December 1253, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bernard III de LA TOUR-d'AUVERGNE est né environ 1190, à Tours, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, France, son père, Bertrand II de LA TOUR-d'AUVERGNE, avait 57 ans et sa mère, Judith de La Tour de Mercoeur, avait 26 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Jeanne DE TOULOUSE-ROCHEFORT. Il est décédé le 29 décembre 1253, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Bernard III de LA TOUR-d'AUVERGNE um 1190 in Tours, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Bertrand II de LA TOUR-d'AUVERGNE 57 und seine Mutter Judith de La Tour de Mercoeur 26. Er hatte mit Jeanne DE TOULOUSE-ROCHEFORT mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 29. Dezember 1253 im Alter von 64 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bernard III de LA TOUR-d'AUVERGNE è nato il circa 1190 nel Tours, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, Francia, il suo padre, Bertrand II de LA TOUR-d'AUVERGNE, aveva 57 anni e il suo madre, Judith de La Tour de Mercoeur, aveva 26 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Jeanne DE TOULOUSE-ROCHEFORT. Morì il 29 dicembre 1253, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Bernard III de LA TOUR-d'AUVERGNEが約1190年にフランスセントアインドレ-エト-ロイアートウルズで生まれた時，父Bertrand II de LA TOUR-d'AUVERGNEは57歳，母Judith de La Tour de Mercoeurは26歳であった。彼はJeanne DE TOULOUSE-ROCHEFORTとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1253年12月29日に64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Bernard III de LA TOUR-d'AUVERGNE(이)가 대략 1190년 프랑스 세트르 인드레-트-로이르 토우르스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Bertrand II de LA TOUR-d'AUVERGNE(은)는 57세였고, 그의 어머니 Judith de La Tour de Mercoeur(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Jeanne DE TOULOUSE-ROCHEFORT(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1253년 12월 29일 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bernard III de LA TOUR-d'AUVERGNE nasceu aproximadamente 1190, em Tours, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, França, seu pai, Bertrand II de LA TOUR-d'AUVERGNE, tinha 57 anos e sua mãe, Judith de La Tour de Mercoeur, tinha 26 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Jeanne DE TOULOUSE-ROCHEFORT. Ele faleceu em 29 de dezembro de 1253, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bernard III de LA TOUR-d'AUVERGNE родился около 1190 г. в местности тоурс, индре-ет-лоир, кентр, Франция, его отцу по имени Bertrand II de LA TOUR-d'AUVERGNE было 57 лет, а матери, которую звали Judith de La Tour de Mercoeur, 26. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Jeanne DE TOULOUSE-ROCHEFORT. Он умер 29 декабря 1253 г. в возрасте 64 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Bernard III de LA TOUR-d'AUVERGNE nació aproximadamente 1190, en Tours, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, Francia, su papá, Bertrand II de LA TOUR-d'AUVERGNE, tenía 57 años y su mamá, Judith de La Tour de Mercoeur, tenía 26 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas con Jeanne DE TOULOUSE-ROCHEFORT. Murió el 29 de diciembre de 1253, a la edad de 64 años.
